## Skill Scope

- [ ] This change keeps the skill focused on SwiftUI macOS glass-style UI work.
- [ ] This change preserves the UI-only safety contract.
- [ ] This change does not encourage business logic, models, networking, persistence, auth, payments, subscriptions, analytics, signing, or deployment-target edits.
